name: Essence Theft
desc: Gains a charge of Essence Theft whenever a spell hits an enemy (max: 3 charges per spell). Upon reaching 9 charges, Ahri's next spell heals her whenever it hits an enemy.

name: Orb of Deception
desc: Ahri sends out and pulls back her orb, dealing magic damage on the way out and true damage on the way back.

name: Fox-Fire
desc: Ahri releases three fox-fires, that lock onto and attack nearby enemies.

name: Charm
desc: Ahri blows a kiss that damages and charms an enemy it encounters, causing them to walk harmlessly towards her. Ahri deals additional damage to recently charmed enemies.

name: Spirit Rush
desc: Ahri dashes forward and fires essence bolts, damaging 3 nearby enemies (prioritizes Champions). Spirit Rush can be cast up to three times before going on cooldown.

name: Trample
desc: Each time Alistar casts a spell, he tramples nearby units and turrets for a few seconds, dealing damage to units he walks over.

name: Pulverize
desc: Alistar smashes the ground, dealing damage to all nearby enemies and tossing them into the air for 1.5 seconds. On landing, enemies are stunned.

name: Headbutt
desc: Alistar rams a target with his head, dealing damage and knocking the target back.

name: Triumphant Roar
desc: Alistar lets out a commanding war cry, restoring Health to himself and nearby friendly units for half the amount. Can be cast more often if nearby enemies are dying.

name: Unbreakable Will
desc: Alistar lets out a wild roar, gaining bonus damage, removing all crowd control effects on himself, and reducing incoming physical and magical damage for the duration.

name: Cursed Touch
desc: Amumu's attacks reduce the target's Magic Resistance for a short duration.

name: Bandage Toss
desc: Amumu tosses a sticky bandage at a target, stunning and damaging the target while he pulls himself to them.

name: Despair
desc: Overcome by anguish, nearby enemies lose a percentage of their maximum Health each second.

name: Tantrum
desc: Permanently reduces the physical damage Amumu would take. Amumu can unleash his rage, dealing damage to surrounding enemies. Each time Amumu is hit, the cooldown on Tantrum is reduced by 0.5 seconds.

name: Curse of the Sad Mummy
desc: Amumu entangles surrounding enemy units in bandages, damaging them and rendering them unable to attack or move.

name: Rebirth
desc: Upon dying, Anivia will revert into an egg. If the egg can survive for six seconds, she is gloriously reborn.

name: Flash Frost
desc: Anivia brings her wings together and summons a sphere of ice that flies towards her opponents, chilling and damaging anyone in its path. When the sphere explodes it does moderate damage in a radius, stunning anyone in the area.

name: Crystallize
desc: Anivia condenses the moisture in the air into an impassable wall of ice to block all movement. The wall only lasts a short duration before it melts.

name: Frostbite
desc: With a flap of her wings, Anivia blasts a freezing gust of wind at her target, dealing a medium amount of damage. If the target has been slowed by Flash Frost or Glacial Storm, the damage they take is doubled.

name: Glacial Storm
desc: Anivia summons a driving rain of ice and hail to damage her enemies and slow their advance.

name: Pyromania
desc: After casting 4 spells, Annie's next offensive spell will stun the target for a short duration.

name: Disintegrate
desc: Annie hurls a Mana infused fireball, dealing damage and refunding the Mana cost if it destroys the target.

name: Incinerate
desc: Annie casts a blazing cone of fire, dealing damage to all enemies in the area.

name: Molten Shield
desc: Increases Annie's Armor and Magic Resist and damages enemies who hit Annie with basic attacks.

name: Summon: Tibbers
desc: Annie wills her bear Tibbers to life, dealing damage to units in the area. Tibbers can attack and also burns enemies that stand near him.

name: Focus
desc: While out of combat, Ashe gains stacks of Focus. When Ashe has 100 stacks of Focus her next basic attack will critically strike.

name: Frost Shot
desc: While active, each of Ashe's basic attacks slow her targets. This drains Mana with each attack.

name: Volley
desc: Ashe fires 7 arrows in a cone for increased damage. Volley also applies Ashe's current level of Frost Shot.

name: Hawkshot
desc: Ashe gains bonus Gold when killing enemy units or structures. Ashe can activate to send her Hawk Spirit on a scouting mission.

name: Enchanted Crystal Arrow
desc: Ashe fires a missile of ice in a straight line. If the arrow collides with an enemy Champion, it deals damage and stuns the Champion for up to 3.5 seconds, based on how far the arrow has traveled. In addition, surrounding enemy units take damage and are slowed.

name: Mana Barrier
desc: When Blitzcrank's life is brought below 20% health, he activates Mana Barrier. This creates a mana shield equal to 50% of his mana for 10 seconds. Mana Barrier can only occur once every 90 seconds.

name: Rocket Grab
desc: Blitzcrank fires his right hand to grab an opponent on its path, dealing damage and dragging it back to him.

name: Overdrive
desc: Blitzcrank super charges himself to get dramatically increased Movement and Attack Speed.

name: Power Fist
desc: Blitzcrank charges up his fist to make his next attack deal double damage and pop his target up in the air.

name: Static Field
desc: Passively causes lightning bolts to damage a nearby enemy. Additionally, Blitzcrank can activate this ability to damage nearby enemies and silence them for 0.5 seconds, but doing so removes the passive lightning until Static Field becomes available again.

name: Blaze
desc: Brand's spells light his targets ablaze, dealing 8% of their maximum Health in magic damage over 4 seconds.

name: Sear
desc: Brand launches a ball of fire forward that deals magic damage. If the target is ablaze, Sear will stun the target for 2 seconds.

name: Pillar of Flame
desc: After a short delay, Brand creates a pillar of flame at a target area, dealing magic damage to enemy units within the area. Units that are ablaze take an additional 25% damage.

name: Conflagration
desc: Brand conjures a powerful blast at his target, dealing magic damage to them. If the target is ablaze, Conflagration spreads to nearby enemies.

name: Pyroclasm
desc: Brand unleashes a devastating torrent of fire, dealing magic damage each time it bounces. If a target is ablaze, Pyroclasm will priotize champions for the next bounce.

name: Carnivore
desc: Whenever Cho'Gath kills a unit, he recovers Health and Mana. The values restored increase with Cho'Gath's level.

name: Rupture
desc: Ruptures the ground at target location, popping enemy units into the air, dealing damage and slowing them.

name: Feral Scream
desc: Cho'Gath unleashes a terrible scream at enemies in a cone, dealing magic damage and Silencing enemies for a few seconds.

name: Vorpal Spikes
desc: Cho'Gath's attacks passively release deadly spikes, dealing damage to all enemy units in front of him.

name: Feast
desc: Devours an enemy unit, dealing a high amount of true damage. If the target is killed, Cho'Gath grows, gaining maximum Health (maximum 6 stacks). Cho'Gath loses half of his stacks upon death. Half the cooldown and mana cost are refunded if a minion or monster is killed.

name: Hextech Shrapnel Shells
desc: Corki's basic attacks deal bonus true damage to minions, monsters, and champions.

name: Phosphorus Bomb
desc: Corki fires a flash bomb at a target location, dealing magic damage to enemies in the area. This attack additionally reveals units in the area for a duration.

name: Valkyrie
desc: Corki surges to target location, dropping bombs that create a trail of destruction for opponents who remain in the fire.

name: Gatling Gun
desc: Corki's gatling gun rapidly fires in a cone in front of him, dealing damage and reducing enemy Armor.

name: Missile Barrage
desc: Corki fires a missile toward his target location that explodes on impact, dealing damage to enemies in an area. Corki stores missiles over time, up to a maximum. Every 3rd missile fired will be a Big One, dealing extra damage.

name: Adrenaline Rush
desc: Dr. Mundo regenerates 0.3% of his maximum Health each second.

name: Infected Cleaver
desc: Dr. Mundo hurls his cleaver, dealing damage equal to a portion of his target's current Health and slowing them for a short time. Dr. Mundo delights in the suffering of others, so he is returned half of the Health cost when he successfully lands a cleaver.

name: Burning Agony
desc: Dr. Mundo drains his Health to reduce the duration of disables and deal continual damage to nearby enemies.

name: Masochism
desc: Masochism increases Dr. Mundo's Attack Damage by a flat amount for 5 seconds. In addition, Dr. Mundo also gains an additional amount of Attack Damage for each percentage of Health he is missing.

name: Sadism
desc: Dr. Mundo sacrifices a portion of his Health for increased Movement Speed and drastically increased Health Regeneration.

name: Shadow Walk
desc: When out of combat, Evelynn enters stealth only being able to be seen by nearby enemy champions or true sight. While stealthed, she rapidly regenerates Mana.

name: Hate Spike
desc: Evelynn fires a line of spikes through an enemy, dealing damage to all enemies in its path.

name: Dark Frenzy
desc: Evelynn passively increases her Movement Speed when hitting enemy champions with her spells. Upon activation, Evelynn breaks free from slows affecting her and gains a massive Movement Speed boost for a short duration.

name: Ravage
desc: Evelynn slashes her target twice, dealing damage with each hit. She then gains increased Attack Speed for a short duration.

name: Agony's Embrace
desc: Evelynn summons spikes from the ground to deal damage and slow enemies in the area. She then gains a shield based on how many enemy champions were hit.

name: Rising Spell Force
desc: Hitting a target with any of Ezreal's abilities increases his Attack Speed by 10% for 6 seconds (effect stacks up to 5 times).

name: Mystic Shot
desc: Ezreal fires a damaging bolt of energy which reduces all of his cooldowns by 1 second if it strikes an enemy unit.

name: Essence Flux
desc: Ezreal fires a fluctuating wave of energy, dealing magic damage to enemy champions, while increasing the Attack Speed of allied champions.

name: Arcane Shift
desc: Ezreal teleports to a target nearby location and fires a homing bolt which strikes the nearest enemy unit.

name: Trueshot Barrage
desc: Ezreal channels for 1 second to fire a powerful barrage of energy missiles which do massive damage to each unit they pass through (deals 10% less damage to each unit it passes through).

name: Dread
desc: Fiddlesticks' spells reduce the Magic Resistance of his targets.

name: Terrify
desc: Strikes a target unit with fear, causing it to flee in terror for a duration.

name: Drain
desc: Fiddlesticks saps the life force of an enemy, dealing damage to a target over time and healing himself.

name: Dark Wind
desc: A wisp of wind strikes an enemy unit and then bounces to nearby enemy units, dealing damage and silencing the victims.

name: Crowstorm
desc: A murder of crows flock wildly around Fiddlesticks, dealing damage each second to all enemy units in the area.

name: Grog-Soaked Blade
desc: Gangplank's basic attacks and Parrrley apply a poison that deals magic damage each second and slows Movement Speed. Lasts 3 seconds and stacks up to 3 times.

name: Parrrley
desc: Gangplank takes aim and shoots an enemy unit with his pistol. If Parrrley deals a killing blow, he gains extra gold and half the Mana cost is refunded.

name: Remove Scurvy
desc: Consumes a large quantity of citrus fruit which clears any crowd control effects on him and heals him.

name: Raise Morale
desc: Gangplank fires a shot into the air, increasing nearby allied champions' Attack Damage and Movement Speed.

name: Cannon Barrage
desc: Gangplank signals his ship to fire upon an area, slowing enemies and dealing damage within the area.

name: Perseverance
desc: If Garen has not been struck by damage or enemy abilities for the last 10 seconds, Garen regenerates 0.4% of his maximum Health each second. Minion damage does not stop Perseverance.

name: Decisive Strike
desc: Garen gains a burst of Movement Speed, breaking free of all slows affecting him and his next attack strikes a vital area of his foe, dealing bonus damage and silencing them.

name: Courage
desc: Garen passively increases his Armor and Magic Resist. He may also activate this ability to grant himself a shield that reduces incoming damage for a short time.

name: Judgment
desc: Garen performs a dance of death with his sword, dealing damage around him for the duration.

name: Demacian Justice
desc: Garen calls upon the might of Demacia to deal a finishing blow to an enemy champion that deals damage based upon how much Health his target has missing.

name: Happy Hour
desc: On ability use, Gragas takes a drink restoring 2% of his max health over 4 seconds.

name: Barrel Roll
desc: Gragas rolls his cask to a location, which can be activated to explode or will explode on its own after 5 seconds. Enemies struck by the blast have their Attack Speed lowered.

name: Drunken Rage
desc: Gragas guzzles down brew from his cask for 1 second, restoring his Mana. After finishing, he becomes drunkenly empowered, increasing his damage dealt and reducing damage received.

name: Body Slam
desc: Gragas charges to a location and collides with the first enemy unit he comes across, dealing damage to all nearby enemy units and slowing their movement.

name: Explosive Cask
desc: Gragas hurls his cask to a location, dealing damage and knocking back enemies caught in the blast radius.

name: Techmaturgical Repair Bots
desc: Heimerdinger gives nearby allied H-28G Turrets and Champions increased Health Regeneration.

name: H-28G Evolution Turret
desc: Heimerdinger lays down a machine gun turret. Turrets gain abilities as this skill is increased. (Turrets deal half damage to towers).

name: Hextech Micro-Rockets
desc: Heimerdinger fires long-range rockets that converge on his cursor.

name: CH-1 Concussion Grenade
desc: Heimerdinger lobs a grenade at a location, dealing damage to enemy units as well as stunning anyone directly hit and blinding surrounding units.

name: UPGRADE!!!
desc: Passive / Active: Passively increases Cooldown Reduction. Activate to heal all active Evolution Turrets and cause them to fire frost shots, which reduce Movement Speed, for a short time.

name: Tailwind
desc: Increases the Movement Speed of all allied champions by 5%.

name: Howling Gale
desc: By creating a localized change in pressure and temperature, Janna is able to create a small storm that grows in size with time. She can activate the spell again to release the storm. On release this storm will fly towards the direction it was cast in, dealing damage and knocking away any enemies in its path.

name: Zephyr
desc: Janna summons an air elemental that passively increases her Movement Speed and enables her to pass through units. She may also activate this ability to deal damage and slow an enemy's Movement Speed. The passive is lost while this ability is on cooldown.

name: Eye Of The Storm
desc: Janna conjures a defensive gale that shields an ally champion or turret from incoming damage and increases their Attack Damage.

name: Monsoon
desc: Janna surrounds herself in a magical storm, throwing enemies back. After the storm has settled, soothing winds heal nearby allies while the ability is active.

name: Martial Cadence
desc: Jarvan IV's initial basic attack on a target deals bonus physical damage. This effect cannot occur again on the same target for a short duration.

name: Dragon Strike
desc: Jarvan IV extends his lance, dealing physical damage and lowering the Armor of all enemies in its path. Additionally, this will pull Jarvan to his Demacian Standard, knocking up enemies in his path.

name: Golden Aegis
desc: Jarvan IV calls upon the ancient kings of Demacia to shield him from harm and slow surrounding enemies.

name: Demacian Standard
desc: Jarvan IV carries the pride of Demacia, passively granting him bonus Attack Speed and Armor. Activating Demacian Standard allows Jarvan IV to place a Demacian flag that deals magic damage on impact and grants Attack Speed to nearby allied champions.

name: Cataclysm
desc: Jarvan IV heroically leaps into battle at a target with such force that he terraforms the surrounding area to create an arena around them.

name: Relentless Assault
desc: Jax's consecutive basic attacks continuously increase his Attack Speed.

name: Leap Strike
desc: Jax leaps toward a unit. If they are an enemy, he strikes them with his weapon.

name: Empower
desc: Jax charges his weapon with energy, causing his next attack to deal additional damage.

name: Counter Strike
desc: Jax's combat prowess allows him to dodge all incoming attacks for a short duration and then quickly counterattack, stunning all surrounding enemies.

name: Grandmaster's Might
desc: Every third consecutive attack deals additional Magic Damage. Additionally, Jax can activate this ability to strengthen his resolve, increasing his Armor and Magic Resist for a short duration.

name: Death Defied
desc: Upon dying, Karthus enters a spirit form that allows him to continue casting spells while dead for 7 seconds.

name: Lay Waste
desc: Karthus unleashes a delayed blast at a location, dealing damage to nearby enemies.

name: Wall of Pain
desc: Karthus creates a passable screen of leeching energy. Any enemy units that walk through the screen have their Movement Speed and Magic Resist reduced for a period.

name: Defile
desc: Karthus passively steals energy from his victims, gaining Mana on each kill. Alternatively, Karthus can surround himself in the souls of his prey, dealing damage to nearby enemies, but quickly draining his own Mana.

name: Requiem
desc: After channeling for 3 seconds, Karthus deals damage to all enemy champions.

name: Void Stone
desc: Kassadin takes 15% reduced magic damage and ignores unit collision.

name: Null Sphere
desc: Kassadin fires an orb of void energy at a target, dealing damage and interrupting channels. The excess energy forms around himself, granting a temporary shield that absorbs magic damage.

name: Nether Blade
desc: Passive: Kassadin's basic attacks deal bonus magic damage. Active: Kassadin's next basic attack deals significant bonus magic damage and restores Mana.

name: Force Pulse
desc: Kassadin draws energy from spells cast in his vicinity. Upon charging up, Kassadin can use Force Pulse to damage and slow enemies in a cone in front of him.

name: Riftwalk
desc: Kassadin teleports to a nearby location dealing damage to nearby enemy units. Multiple Riftwalks in a short period of time cost additional Mana but also deal additional damage.

name: Voracity
desc: Champion kills or assists reduce Katarina's cooldowns by 15 seconds.

name: Bouncing Blades
desc: Katarina throws a dagger that bounces from enemy to enemy, dealing magic damage and marking them. Her next spell or basic attack against a marked target will consume the mark and deal additional magic damage.

name: Sinister Steel
desc: Katarina whirls her daggers around her, dealing magic damage to all enemies in the area. If she hits an enemy Champion, Katarina gains a burst of speed for a short duration.

name: Shunpo
desc: Katarina instantly teleports to her target's location and takes reduced damage from enemies for a few seconds. If the target is an enemy, she deals damage.

name: Death Lotus
desc: Katarina becomes a flurry of blades, throwing daggers with unrivaled speed at up to three nearby Champions. Daggers deal magic damage and reduce incoming healing on targets hit.

name: Holy Fervor
desc: When Kayle attacks a champion, the target loses 3% Armor and Magic Resistance for 5 seconds. This effect stacks up to 5 times.

name: Reckoning
desc: Blasts an enemy unit with angelic force, dealing damage, slowing Movement Speed, and applying Holy Fervor.

name: Divine Blessing
desc: Blesses a target friendly champion, granting them increased Movement Speed and healing them.

name: Righteous Fury
desc: Ignites Kayle's sword with a holy flame, granting Kayle a ranged splash attack and bonus magic damage.

name: Intervention
desc: Shields Kayle or an ally for a short time, causing them to be immune to damage.

name: Icathian Surprise
desc: Upon dying, Kog'Maw starts a chain reaction in his body which causes him to move faster and detonate after 4 seconds; dealing 100 + (25 x lvl) true damage to surrounding enemies.

name: Caustic Spittle
desc: Passive: Increases Kog'Maw's Attack Speed. Active: Kog'Maw launches a corrosive projectile which deals Magic Damage and corrodes the target's Armor and Magic Resist for 4 seconds.

name: Bio-Arcane Barrage
desc: Kog'Maw's attacks gain range and deal a percent of the target's maximum Health as Magic Damage.

name: Void Ooze
desc: Kog'Maw launches a peculiar ooze which damages all enemies it passes through and leaves a trail which slows enemies who stand on it.

name: Living Artillery
desc: Kog'Maw fires a living artillery shell at a great distance dealing damage and revealing non-stealthed targets. Additionally, multiple Living Artilleries in a short period of time cause them to cost additional Mana.

name: Flurry
desc: After Lee Sin uses an ability, his next 2 basic attacks gain 40% Attack Speed and return 15 Energy each.

name: Sonic Wave / Resonating Strike
desc: Sonic Wave: Lee Sin projects a discordant wave of sound to locate his enemies, dealing physical damage to the first enemy it encounters. If Sonic Wave hits, Lee Sin can cast Resonating Strike for the next 3 seconds.Resonating Strike: Lee Sin dashes to the enemy hit by Sonic Wave, dealing physical damage plus 8% of their missing Health.

name: Safeguard / Iron Will
desc: Safeguard: Lee Sin rushes towards a target ally, shielding himself from damage. If the ally is a champion, they are also shielded. After using Safeguard, Lee Sin can cast Iron Will for the next 3 seconds.Iron Will: Lee Sin's intense training allows him to thrive in battle. For 5 seconds, Lee Sin gains Life Steal and Spell Vamp.

name: Tempest / Cripple
desc: Tempest: Lee Sin smashes the ground, sending out a shockwave that deals magic damage and reveals enemy units hit. If Tempest hits an enemy, Lee Sin can cast cripple for the next 3 seconds.Cripple: Lee Sin cripples nearby enemies revealed by Tempest, reducing their Movement Speed for 4 seconds. Movement Speed recovers gradually over the duration.

name: Dragon's Rage
desc: Lee Sin performs a powerful roundhouse kick launching his target back, dealing physical damage to the target and any enemies they collide with. Enemies the target collides with are knocked into the air for a short duration. This technique was taught to him by Jesse Perring, although Lee Sin does not kick players off the map.

name: Sunlight
desc: Damaging spells afflict enemies with Sunlight for 3.5 seconds. When allied Champions deal damage to those targets, they consume the Sunlight debuff to deal additional magic damage.

name: Shield of Daybreak
desc: Leona uses her shield to perform her next basic attack, dealing bonus magic damage and stunning the target.

name: Eclipse
desc: Leona raises her shield to gain Armor and Magic Resistance. When the duration first ends, if there are nearby enemies, she will deal magic damage to them and prolong the duration of the effect.

name: Zenith Blade
desc: Leona projects a solar image of her sword, dealing magic damage to all enemies in a line. When the image fades, the last enemy champion struck will be briefly immobilized and Leona will dash to them.

name: Solar Flare
desc: Leona calls down a beam of solar energy, dealing damage to enemies in an area. Enemies in the center of the area are stunned, while enemies on the outside are slowed.

name: Pix, Faerie Companion
desc: Pix is a wild Faerie that accompanies Lulu. Pix will fire a barrage of magical energy at targets that Lulu attacks.

name: Glitterlance
desc: Pix and Lulu each fire a bolt of magical energy that heavily slows all enemies it hits. An enemy can only be damaged by one bolt.

name: Whimsy
desc: If cast on an ally, grants them Movement Speed for a short time. If cast on an enemy, turns them into an adorable critter that can't attack or cast spells.

name: Help, Pix!
desc: If cast on an ally, commands Pix to jump to an ally and shield them. He then follows them and aids their attacks. If cast on an enemy, commands Pix to jump to an enemy and damage them. He then follows them and grants you vision of that enemy.

name: Wild Growth
desc: Lulu enlarges an ally, knocking nearby enemies into the air and granting the ally a large amount of bonus Health. For the next few seconds, that ally gains an aura that slows nearby enemies.

name: Illumination
desc: Lux's damaging spells charge the target with energy for 6 seconds. Lux's next attack ignites the energy, dealing bonus magic damage (depending on Lux's level) to the target.

name: Light Binding
desc: Lux releases a sphere of light that binds and deals damage to up to two enemy units.

name: Prismatic Barrier
desc: Lux throws her wand and bends the light around any friendly target it touches, protecting them from enemy damage.

name: Lucent Singularity
desc: Fires an anomaly of twisted light to an area, which slows nearby enemies. Lux can detonate it to damage enemies in the area of effect.

name: Final Spark
desc: After gathering energy, Lux fires a beam of light that deals damage to all targets in the area. In addition, triggers Lux's passive ability and refreshes the Illumination debuff duration.

name: Granite Shield
desc: Malphite is shielded by a layer of rock which absorbs damage up to 10% of his maximum Health. If Malphite has not been hit for 10 seconds, this effect recharges.

name: Seismic Shard
desc: Using his primal elemental magic, Malphite sends a shard of the earth through the ground at his foe, dealing damage upon impact and stealing Movement Speed for 4 seconds.

name: Brutal Strikes
desc: Malphite starts to hit with such force that his attacks deal damage to all units in front of him. Activating Brutal Strikes greatly increases his Armor and Attack Damage for a short amount of time.

name: Ground Slam
desc: Malphite slams the ground, sending out a shockwave that deals magic damage based on his Armor as damage and reduces the Attack Speed of enemies for a short duration.

name: Unstoppable Force
desc: Malphite ferociously charges to a location, damaging enemies and knocking them into the air.

name: Summon Voidling
desc: After casting 4 spells, Malzahar summons an uncontrollable Voidling to engage enemy units for 21 seconds. Voidlings have 200 + 50 x lvl Health and 20 + 5 x lvl Attack Damage.Voidlings Grow after 7 seconds (+50% Attack Damage/Armor), and Frenzy after 14 seconds (+100% Attack Speed).

name: Call of the Void
desc: Malzahar opens up two portals to the Void. After a short delay, they fire projectiles that deal Magic Damage and silence enemy champions.

name: Null Zone
desc: Malzahar creates a zone of negative energy which damages enemies that stand in it.

name: Malefic Visions
desc: Malzahar infects his target's mind with cruel visions of their demise, dealing damage each second. If the target dies while afflicted by the visions, they pass on to a nearby enemy unit and Malzahar gains Mana. Malzahar's Voidlings are attracted to affected units.

name: Nether Grasp
desc: Malzahar channels the essence of the Void to suppress an enemy champion and deal damage each second.

name: Double Strike
desc: Every few strikes, Master Yi strikes twice.

name: Alpha Strike
desc: Master Yi teleports across the battlefield with blinding speed, dealing physical damage to multiple units in his path, while simultaneously becoming untargetable. Alpha Strike can critically strike and deals bonus physical damage to minions and monsters. Basic attacks reduce Alpha Strike's cooldown.

name: Meditate
desc: Master Yi rejuvenates his body by focus of mind, restoring Health and taking reduced damage for a short time.

name: Wuju Style
desc: Master Yi becomes skilled in the art of Wuju, passively increasing his Attack Damage. Activating Wuju Style grants bonus true damage on basic attacks, but the passive bonus is then lost while on cooldown.

name: Highlander
desc: Master Yi moves with unparalleled agility, temporarily increasing his Movement and Attack Speeds as well as making him immune to all slowing effects. While active, Champion kills or assists extends Highlander's duration. Passively reduces cooldown for his other abilities on a kill or assist.

name: Strut
desc: After 5 seconds of not being attacked, Miss Fortune gains an additional 25 Movement Speed. This bonus increases by 8 each second up to a maximum bonus of 70.

name: Double Up
desc: Miss Fortune fires a bullet at an enemy, damaging them and a target behind them.

name: Impure Shots
desc: Miss Fortune passively increases damage dealt to a target with each strike. This ability can be activated to increase Miss Fortune's Attack Speed and cause her attacks to lower healing received by the target.

name: Make It Rain
desc: Miss Fortune unleashes a flurry of bullets at a location, dealing waves of damage to opponents and slowing them.

name: Bullet Time
desc: Miss Fortune channels a flurry of bullets into a cone in front of her, dealing large amounts of damage to enemies.

name: Soul Siphon
desc: Morgana has Spell Vamp, healing herself whenever she deals damage with her spells.

name: Dark Binding
desc: Morgana releases a sphere of dark magic. Upon contact with an enemy unit, the sphere will deal magic damage and force the unit to the ground for a period of time.

name: Tormented Soil
desc: Infects an area with desecrated soil, causing enemy units who stand on the location to take continual damage.

name: Black Shield
desc: Places a protective barrier around an allied champion, absorbing magical damage and disables until penetrated or the shield dissipates.

name: Soul Shackles
desc: Latches chains of energy onto nearby enemy champions, dealing initial damage to them and slowing their Movement Speed, and then echoing the pain a few seconds later and stunning them if they remain close to Morgana.

name: Soul Eater
desc: Nasus drains his foe's spiritual energy, giving him bonus Life Steal.

name: Siphoning Strike
desc: Nasus strikes his foe, dealing damage and increasing the power of his future Siphoning Strikes if he slays his target.

name: Wither
desc: Nasus ages an enemy champion, decelerating their Movement and Attack Speeds over time.

name: Spirit Fire
desc: Nasus unleashes a spirit flame at a location, dealing damage and reducing the Armor of enemies who stand on it.

name: Fury of the Sands
desc: Nasus unleashes a mighty sandstorm that batters nearby enemies. While the storm rages, he gains increased Health, Attack Range, and drains nearby enemies' max Health converting into bonus damage for the duration.

name: Prowl
desc: Moving through brush increases Nidalee's Movement Speed by 10% for 2 seconds, increased to 30% toward visible enemy champions within 5500 range.Hitting champions with Javelin Toss and Bushwhack triggers a Hunt, revealing them for 4 seconds. During this time, Nidalee gains 10% Movement Speed (increased to 30% toward the Hunted target) and her first Takedown and Pounce are enhanced against them.

name: Javelin Toss / Takedown
desc: In human form, Nidalee throws a spiked javelin at her target that gains damage as it flies.  As a cougar, her next attack will attempt to fatally wound her target, dealing more damage the less life they have.

name: Bushwhack / Pounce
desc: In human form, Nidalee lays a trap for unwary opponents that, when sprung, damages and reveals its target. As a cougar, she jumps in a direction, dealing damage in an area where she lands.

name: Primal Surge / Swipe
desc: In human form, Nidalee channels the spirit of the cougar to heal her allies and imbue them with Attack Speed for a short duration. As a cougar, she claws in a direction, dealing damage to enemies in front of her.

name: Aspect Of The Cougar
desc: Nidalee transforms into a cougar, gaining new abilities.

name: Visionary
desc: Nunu can cast a spell for free after 5 attacks.

name: Consume
desc: Nunu commands the yeti to take a bite out of a target minion or monster, dealing heavy damage to it and healing himself.

name: Blood Boil
desc: Nunu invigorates himself and an allied unit by heating their blood, increasing their Movement and Attack Speeds.

name: Ice Blast
desc: Nunu launches a ball of ice at an enemy unit, dealing damage and temporarily slowing their Movement and Attack Speeds.

name: Absolute Zero
desc: Nunu begins to sap the area of heat, slowing all nearby enemies. When the spell ends, he deals massive damage to all enemies caught in the area.

name: Berserker Rage
desc: For each 1% of Health missing, Olaf's Attack Speed is increased by 1%.

name: Undertow
desc: Olaf throws an axe into the ground at a target location, dealing damage to units it passes through and slowing their Movement Speed. If Olaf picks up the axe, the ability's cooldown is reduced by 4.5 seconds.

name: Vicious Strikes
desc: Olaf's Attack Speed is increased, he gains Life Steal and has increased healing from all sources based on how much Health he is missing.

name: Reckless Swing
desc: Olaf attacks with such force that it deals true damage to his target and himself, refunding the Health cost if he destroys the target.

name: Ragnarok
desc: Olaf temporarily becomes immune to disables.

name: Aegis Protection
desc: After attacking or casting spells 4 times, Pantheon will block the next incoming basic attack or turret attack.

name: Spear Shot
desc: Pantheon hurls his spear at an opponent, dealing damage.

name: Aegis of Zeonia
desc: Pantheon leaps at an enemy and bashes the enemy with his shield, stunning them. After finishing the attack, Pantheon readies himself to block the next attack.

name: Heartseeker Strike
desc: Pantheon focuses and unleashes 3 swift strikes to the area in front of him, dealing double damage to champions. Pantheon also becomes more aware of his enemy's vital spots, allowing him to always crit enemies below 15% Health.

name: Grand Skyfall
desc: Pantheon composes himself then leaps into the air to a target, striking all enemy units in an area. Enemies closer to the impact point take more damage.

name: Spiked Shell
desc: Rammus gains additional damage as his shell becomes reinforced, converting 25% of his Armor into Attack Damage.

name: Powerball
desc: Rammus accelerates in a ball towards his enemies, dealing damage and slowing targets affected by the impact.

name: Defensive Ball Curl
desc: Rammus goes into a defensive formation, vastly increasing his Armor and Magic Resist, while returning damage to attacks.

name: Puncturing Taunt
desc: Rammus taunts an enemy champion or monster into a reckless assault against Rammus' hard shell, reducing Armor temporarily.

name: Tremors
desc: Rammus creates waves of destruction pulsing through the ground, causing damage to units and structures near him.

name: Arcane Mastery
desc: When Ryze casts a spell, all other spells have their cooldown reduced by 1 second.

name: Overload
desc: Ryze throws a charge of pure energy at an enemy for heavy damage and additional damage based upon Ryze's maximum Mana. Ryze also gains passive cooldown reduction.

name: Rune Prison
desc: Ryze traps target enemy unit in a cage of runes, damaging them and preventing them from moving. Also gains bonus damage based on Ryze's maximum Mana.

name: Spell Flux
desc: Ryze releases an orb of pure magical power that deals damage and bounces from the initial target up to 5 times. Also gains bonus damage based on Ryze's maximum Mana. Targets hit have their Magic Resistance reduced.

name: Desperate Power
desc: Ryze channels immense arcane power, he gains Spell Vamp and all of his spells deal area of effect damage.

name: Backstab
desc: Shaco deals 20% bonus damage when striking a unit from behind.

name: Deceive
desc: Shaco becomes invisible and teleports to target location. His next attack is guaranteed to critically strike.

name: Jack In The Box
desc: Shaco creates an invisible, animated Jack-in-the-Box, which will fear, and then attack, nearby enemies.

name: Two-Shiv Poison
desc: Shaco's Shivs passively poison targets on hit, slowing them and applying a miss chance to minions and monsters. He can throw his Shivs to deal damage and poison the target.

name: Hallucinate
desc: Shaco creates an illusion of himself near him, which can attack nearby enemies. (Deals half damage to turrets.)  Upon death, it explodes, dealing damage to nearby enemies.

name: Feel No Pain
desc: Sion has a chance to take reduced damage from basic attacks.

name: Cryptic Gaze
desc: Sion blasts a terrifying gaze at the target enemy, dealing magic damage and stunning them.

name: Death's Caress
desc: Sion grants himself a shield for a few seconds. Death's Caress can be recast while the shield holds, and does so automatically at the end of its duration, consuming the shield to deal magic damage to nearby enemies.

name: Enrage
desc: Toggle: Sion gains bonus attack damage. While active, he gains bonus health whenever he kills an enemy, doubled against large enemies and takedowns on champions.

name: Cannibalism
desc: Sion empowers himself, gaining bonus attack speed and life steal, and causing his basic attacks to heal nearby allies for a percentage of the damage dealt.

name: Empowered Bulwark
desc: Increases Singed's Health by 25 for every 100 Mana he has.

name: Poison Trail
desc: Leaves a trail of poison behind Singed, dealing damage to enemies caught in the path.

name: Mega Adhesive
desc: Throws a vial of mega adhesive on the ground, slowing enemies who walk on it.

name: Fling
desc: Damages target enemy unit and flings them into the air behind Singed. If the target Singed flings lands in his Mega Adhesive, they are also rooted.

name: Insanity Potion
desc: Singed drinks a potent brew of chemicals, granting him increased combat stats.

name: Fleet of Foot
desc: Sivir gains a short burst of Movement Speed when she attacks an enemy champion.

name: Boomerang Blade
desc: Sivir hurls her crossblade like a boomerang, dealing damage each way.

name: Ricochet
desc: Sivir's next few basic attacks will bounce to nearby targets, dealing reduced damage to secondary targets.

name: Spell Shield
desc: Creates a magical barrier that blocks a single enemy ability cast on Sivir. She receives Mana back if a spell is blocked.

name: On The Hunt
desc: Sivir leads her allies in battle, granting them a surge Movement Speed for a period of time. Additionally passively grants Sivir bonus Attack Speed while Ricochet is active.

name: Crystallizing Sting
desc: Skarner's damaging spells apply Crystal Venom to enemies for 5 seconds that stacks up to 3 times. If an enemy has 3 stacks of Crystal Venom, Skarner's next attack will deal additional magic damage and stun the target. Skarner cannot apply Crystal Venom to this target for 6 seconds after he stuns them.

name: Crystal Slash
desc: Skarner lashes out with his claws, dealing physical damage to all nearby enemies and charging himself with Crystal Energy for several seconds if a unit is struck. If he casts Crystal Slash again while powered by Crystal Energy, he deals bonus magic damage. Whenever he hits a target with Crystal Slash he gains a stacking buff that increases his Attack Speed for a few seconds. Basic attack reduce this ability's cooldown.

name: Crystalline Exoskeleton
desc: Skarner gains a shield, and while the shield persists his Movement Speed is increased.

name: Fracture
desc: Skarner summons a blast of crystalline energy which deals damage to enemies struck and slows them.

name: Impale
desc: Skarner suppresses an enemy champion and deals magic damage to it. During this time, Skarner can move freely and will drag his helpless victim around with him. When the effect ends, Skarner's target will be dealt additional damage.

name: Power Chord
desc: After casting 3 spells, Sona's next attack deals bonus magic damage in addition to a bonus effect depending on what song Sona last activated.

name: Hymn of Valor
desc: Sona plays the Hymn of Valor, sends out bolts of sound, dealing magic damage to two nearby enemies, prioritizing champions and monsters. Sona gains a temporary aura that grants allies tagged by the zone bonus damage on their next attack against enemies and extends the duration of her aura for each ally she aids.

name: Aria of Perseverance
desc: Sona plays the Aria of Perseverance, sending out protective melodies, healing Sona and a nearby wounded ally. Sona gains a temporary aura that grants allies tagged by the zone a temporary shield and extends the duration of her aura for each ally she aids.

name: Song of Celerity
desc: Sona plays the Song of Celerity, granting herself bonus Movement Speed that decays over time. Sona gains a temporary aura that grants nearby allied champions bonus Movement Speed and extends the duration of her aura for each ally she aids.

name: Crescendo
desc: Sona plays her ultimate chord, stunning enemy champions and forcing them to dance and dealing magic damage to them. Each rank increases the power of all aura effects.

name: Consecration
desc: Increases surrounding allies' Magic Resist by 16.

name: Starcall
desc: A shower of stars falls from the sky, striking all nearby enemies for magic damage and reducing their Magic Resist for a short duration.

name: Astral Blessing
desc: Soraka blesses a friendly unit, restoring health and granting them bonus armor for a couple seconds.

name: Infuse
desc: Cast on an ally, Soraka drains some of her own mana to restore mana to them. Cast on an enemy, Soraka silences the target and deals magic damage to them.

name: Wish
desc: Soraka fills her allies with hope, instantly restoring health to herself and all friendly champions.

name: Gemcraft
desc: After casting a spell, Taric's next basic attack deals bonus magic damage based on his Armor and reduces his cooldowns.

name: Imbue
desc: Taric brings forth earthen energy to heal an ally and himself. This heal is more potent when Taric heals only himself.

name: Shatter
desc: Taric is protected by a hardening aura, increasing the Armor of himself and nearby allied champions. He may choose to splinter the enchanted rocks surrounding him to deal damage and decrease the Armor of nearby enemies at the cost of some Armor for a short time.

name: Dazzle
desc: Taric emits a brilliant ball of prismatic light from his gemmed shield, stunning his target and damaging them based on how close he is to them.

name: Radiance
desc: Taric slams his hammer into the ground to deal damage to nearby enemies. For a time after, Taric's gems radiate energy, empowering Taric and his allies with bonus Attack Damage and Ability Power.

name: Camouflage
desc: If Teemo stands still and takes no actions for a short duration, he becomes stealthed indefinitely. After leaving stealth, Teemo gains the Element of Surprise, increasing his Attack Speed by 40% for 3 seconds.

name: Blinding Dart
desc: Obscures an enemy's vision with a powerful venom, dealing damage to the target unit and blinding it for the duration.

name: Move Quick
desc: Teemo scampers around, passively increasing his Movement Speed until he is struck by an enemy champion or turret. Teemo can sprint to gain bonus Movement Speed that isn't stopped by being struck for a short time.

name: Toxic Shot
desc: Each of Teemo's attacks will poison the target, dealing damage on impact and each second after for 4 seconds.

name: Noxious Trap
desc: Teemo places an explosive poisonous trap using one of the mushrooms stored in his pack. If an enemy steps on the trap, it will release a poisonous cloud, slowing enemies and damaging them over time.

name: Draw a Bead
desc: Increases Tristana's Attack Range as she levels.

name: Rapid Fire
desc: Tristana fires her weapon rapidly, increasing her Attack Speed for a short time.

name: Rocket Jump
desc: Tristana fires at the ground to propel herself to a distant location, dealing damage and slowing surrounding units for 3 seconds where she lands.

name: Explosive Shot
desc: When Tristana kills a unit, her cannonballs burst into shrapnel, dealing damage to surrounding enemies. Can be activated to deal damage to target unit over time, and reduce healing received.

name: Buster Shot
desc: Tristana loads a massive cannonball into her weapon and fires it at an enemy unit. This deals Magic Damage and knocks the target back.

name: Battle Fury
desc: Tryndamere gains Fury for each attack, critical strike, and killing blow he makes. Fury passively increases his Critical Strike Chance and can be consumed with his Bloodlust spell.

name: Bloodlust
desc: Tryndamere thrives on the thrills of combat, increasing his Attack Damage as he is more and more wounded. He can cast Bloodlust to consume his Fury and heal himself.

name: Mocking Shout
desc: Tryndamere lets out an insulting cry, decreasing surrounding champions' Attack Damage. Enemies with their backs turned to Tryndamere also have their Movement Speed reduced.

name: Spinning Slash
desc: Tryndamere slices toward a target unit, dealing damage to enemies in his path.

name: Undying Rage
desc: Tryndamere's lust for battle becomes so strong that he is unable to die, no matter how wounded he becomes.

name: Loaded Dice
desc: Upon killing a unit, Twisted Fate rolls his 'lucky' dice receiving anywhere between 1 and 6 bonus gold.

name: Wild Cards
desc: Twisted Fate throws three cards, dealing damage to each enemy unit they pass through.

name: Pick A Card
desc: Twisted Fate chooses a magic card from his deck, and uses that for his next attack, causing bonus effects.

name: Stacked Deck
desc: Every 4 attacks, Twisted Fate deals bonus damage. In addition, his Attack Speed is increased.

name: Destiny
desc: Twisted Fate predicts the fortunes of his foes, revealing all enemy champions and enabling the use of Gate, which teleports Twisted Fate to any target location in 1.5 seconds.

name: Deadly Venom
desc: Twitch's basic attacks infect the target, dealing true damage each second.

name: Ambush
desc: Twitch becomes invisible for a short duration and, while invisible, he gains Movement Speed. When leaving invisibility, Twitch gains Attack Speed for a short duration.

name: Debilitating Poison
desc: Upon activation, slows nearby enemy champions by 30%, increased by 6% per Deadly Venom stack applied to them. Adding more Deadly Venom stacks after the slow is applied will further reduce their movement speed.

name: Expunge
desc: All nearby enemies secrete Twitch's toxic venoms from their bodies, dealing damage for each stack.

name: Spray and Pray
desc: Twitch closes his eyes and fires his crossbow, rapidly spraying powerful piercing bolts ahead of him.

name: Night Hunter
desc: Vayne ruthlessly hunts evil-doers. She gains 30 Movement Speed when moving toward nearby enemy champions.

name: Tumble
desc: Vayne tumbles, maneuvering to carefully place her next shot. Her next attack deals bonus damage.

name: Silver Bolts
desc: Vayne tips her bolts with a rare metal, toxic to evil things. The third consecutive attack or ability against the same target deals a percentage of the target's maximum Health as bonus true damage. (Max: 200 damage vs. Monsters)

name: Condemn
desc: Vayne draws a heavy crossbow from her back, and fires a huge bolt at her target, knocking them back and dealing damage. If they collide with terrain, they are impaled, dealing bonus damage and stunning them.

name: Final Hour
desc: Readying herself for an epic confrontation, Vayne gains increased Attack Damage, invisibility during Tumble, and triple the bonus Movement Speed from Night Hunter.

name: Equilibrium
desc: Veigar's Mana Regen is increased by 1% for each 1% of Mana missing.

name: Baleful Strike
desc: Unleashes dark energy at target enemy, dealing Magic Damage. If a unit is killed, Veigar gains some Ability Power permanently.

name: Dark Matter
desc: Veigar calls a great mass of dark matter to fall from the sky to the target location, dealing Magic Damage when it lands.

name: Event Horizon
desc: Veigar twists the edges of space around the target location for 3 seconds, stunning enemies who pass through the perimeter.

name: Primordial Burst
desc: Blasts target enemy champion, dealing a large base amount of Magic Damage plus 80% of his target's Ability Power.

name: Eternal Thirst
desc: Each of Warwick's attacks will heal him. Each successive attack against the same target will steal more and more Health.

name: Hungering Strike
desc: Takes a bite out of an enemy unit and heals Warwick.

name: Hunter's Call
desc: Warwick lets out a howl, increasing all nearby friendly champions' Attack Speed for a short time.

name: Blood Scent
desc: Warwick passively senses weakened enemy champions around him. The scent of blood sends him into a fury, causing him to move at incredible speeds.

name: Infinite Duress
desc: Warwick lunges at an enemy champion, suppressing his target and dealing magic damage for a few seconds.

name: Stone Skin
desc: Increases Wukong's Armor and Magic Resistance for each nearby enemy champion.

name: Crushing Blow
desc: Wukong's next attack deals additional physical damage, gains range, and reduces the enemy's Armor for a short duration.

name: Decoy
desc: Wukong becomes invisible for 1.5 seconds. An uncontrollable decoy is left behind that will deal Magic Damage to enemies near it after 1.5 seconds.

name: Nimbus Strike
desc: Wukong dashes toward a target enemy and sends out images to attack up to 2 additional enemies near his target, dealing physical damage to each enemy struck.

name: Cyclone
desc: Wukong's staff grows outward and he spins it around, dealing damage and knocking up enemies. Wukong gains Movement Speed over the duration of the spell.

name: Heightened Learning
desc: Zilean and his nearby allied champions receive 8% additional experience.

name: Time Bomb
desc: Places a bomb on any unit, allied or enemy, which detonates after 4 seconds, dealing area of effect damage.

name: Rewind
desc: Zilean can prepare himself for future confrontations, reducing the cooldowns of all of his other abilities.

name: Time Warp
desc: Zilean bends time around any unit, decreasing an enemy's Movement Speed or increasing an ally's Movement Speed for a short time.

name: Chronoshift
desc: Zilean places a protective time rune on an allied champion, teleporting the champion back in time if they take lethal damage.

name: Twin Disciplines
desc:
Discipline of Force: Akali's basic attacks deal an additional 6% bonus Magic Damage, increasing by 1% for every 6 Ability Power.

Discipline of Might: Akali gains 6% Spell Vamp, increasing by 1% for every 6 Bonus Attack Damage.

name: Mark of the Assassin
desc: Akali spins her kama at a target enemy to deal Magic Damage and mark the target for 6 seconds. Akali's melee attacks against a marked target will trigger and consume the mark to cause additional damage and restore Energy.

name: Twilight Shroud
desc: Akali throws down a cover of smoke. While inside the area, Akali becomes invisible and gains a short burst of Movement Speed. Attacking or using abilities will briefly reveal her. Enemies inside the smoke have their Movement Speed reduced.

name: Crescent Slash
desc: Akali flourishes her kamas, dealing damage based on her Attack Damage and Ability Power.

name: Shadow Dance
desc: Akali moves through shadows to quickly strike her target, dealing damage and consuming an Essence of Shadow charge. Akali recharges Essence of Shadow charges both periodically and upon kills and assists, max 3 stacks.

name: Headshot
desc: Every few basic attacks, Caitlyn will fire a headshot dealing 150% damage to a champion or 250% damage to a minion.

name: Piltover Peacemaker
desc: Caitlyn revs up her rifle for 1 second to unleash a penetrating shot that deals physical damage (deals less damage to subsequent targets).

name: Yordle Snap Trap
desc: Caitlyn sets a trap to find sneaky yordles. When sprung, the trap immobilizes the champion, reveals them for a short duration, and deals magic damage over 1.5 seconds.

name: 90 Caliber Net
desc: Caitlyn fires a heavy net to slow her target. The recoil knocks Caitlyn back.

name: Ace in the Hole
desc: Caitlyn takes time to line up the perfect shot, dealing massive damage to a single target at a huge range. Enemy champions can intercept the bullet for their ally.

name: Duelist
desc: Fiora regenerates Health over 6 seconds each time she deals damage. Striking champions will cause this effect to stack up to 4 times.

name: Lunge
desc: Fiora dashes forward to strike her target, dealing physical damage. Fiora can perform the dash a second time within a couple seconds at no Mana cost.

name: Riposte
desc: Fiora's Attack Damage is increased. When activated, Fiora parries the next basic attack and reflects magic damage back to the attacker. Works against champions, large monsters and large minions.

name: Burst of Speed
desc: Fiora temporarily gains additional Attack Speed. Each basic attack or Lunge she lands during this time increases her Movement Speed. Killing a champion refreshes the cooldown on Burst of Speed.

name: Blade Waltz
desc: Fiora dashes around the battlefield to deal physical damage to enemy champions. Successive strikes against the same target deal less damage.

name: True Grit
desc: Graves gains increasing Armor and Magic Resistance the longer he remains in combat.

name: Buckshot
desc: Graves fires three bullets in a cone, damaging all enemies in their paths.

name: Smoke Screen
desc: Graves fires a smoke canister at the target area creating a cloud of smoke. Enemies inside the smoke cloud have reduced sight range and Movement Speed.

name: Quickdraw
desc: Graves dashes forward gaining an Attack Speed boost for several seconds. Hitting enemies with basic attacks lowers the cooldown of this skill.

name: Collateral Damage
desc: Graves fires an explosive shell dealing heavy damage to the first champion it hits. After hitting a champion or reaching the end of its range, the shell explodes dealing damage in a cone.

name: Ionian Fervor
desc:
Reduces the duration of all disables for each nearby enemy champion.

1 Champion: 10%
2 Champions: 25%
3 Champions: 40%

name: Bladesurge
desc: Irelia dashes forward to strike her target. If it kills the target, Bladesurge's cooldown refreshes and refunds 35 Mana.

name: Hiten Style
desc: Irelia is skilled in the art of Hiten, passively giving her physical attacks Health restoration. Activating Hiten Style doubles her Health restoration and gives her basic attacks true damage.

name: Equilibrium Strike
desc: Irelia's attack balances the scales, dealing damage and slowing the target. However, if the target has a higher Health % than Irelia, then the blow stuns the target instead of slowing.

name: Transcendent Blades
desc: Irelia summons 4 spirit blades that she can fling to deal physical damage and siphon life from enemies they pass through.

name: Mirror Image
desc:
When LeBlanc drops below 40% Health, she becomes invisible for 1 second and creates a Mirror Image that deals no damage and lasts for up to 8 seconds.

Mirror Image has a 1 minute cooldown.

Mirror Image can be controlled by holding the Alt key and using the right mouse button.

name: Sigil of Malice
desc: LeBlanc projects an orb towards her target, dealing magic damage and marking the target for 3.5 seconds. If the target takes damage from one of LeBlanc's abilities, the sigil will trigger, dealing damage.

name: Distortion
desc: LeBlanc rapidly dashes to a target location, dealing magic damage to nearby units. In the following 4 seconds, she can activate Distortion again to return to her starting location.

name: Ethereal Chains
desc: LeBlanc flings illusionary chains towards a target location. If it hits an enemy unit, it will deal initial magic damage and slow their Movement Speed by 25%. If the target remains shackled for 2 seconds, the target takes additional magic damage and is unable to move.

name: Mimic
desc: LeBlanc can cast a mimicked version of the previous spell she cast.

name: Iron Man
desc: A percent of the damage dealt from abilities is converted into a temporary shield, absorbing incoming damage.

name: Mace of Spades
desc: On next hit, Mordekaiser swings his mace with such force that it echoes out, striking up to 3 additional nearby targets, dealing damage plus bonus damage. If the target is alone, the attack deals extra damage.

name: Creeping Death
desc: Unleashes a protective cloud of metal shards to surround an ally, increasing their Armor and Magic Resistance and dealing damage per second to enemies in the cloud.

name: Siphon of Destruction
desc: Mordekaiser deals damage to enemies in a cone in front of him. For each unit hit, Mordekaiser's shield absorbs energy.

name: Children of the Grave
desc: Mordekaiser curses an enemy, stealing a percent of their life initially and each second. If the target dies while the spell is active, their soul is enslaved and will follow Mordekaiser as a ghost for 30 seconds.

name: Zaun-Touched Bolt Augmenter
desc: Urgot's basic attacks and Acid Hunters reduce his targets' damage by 15% for 2.5 seconds.

name: Acid Hunter
desc: Urgot fires an Acid Hunter missile that collides with the first enemy it hits, slowing the target if he has his Terror Capacitor up. Acid Hunter missile-locks on enemies affected by Noxian Corrosive Charge.

name: Terror Capacitor
desc: Urgot charges up his capacitor to gain a shield. While the shield is active, Urgot gains slowing attacks.

name: Noxian Corrosive Charge
desc: Urgot launches a corrosive charge that damages enemies in an area and reduces their Armor.

name: Hyper-Kinetic Position Reverser
desc: Urgot charges up his Hyper-Kinetic Position Reverser, swapping positions with the target. His target is suppressed for the duration of the channel. He gains increased Armor and Magic Resist after the swap.
